properties.description: Identifier for users in the performance data table
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should not be used as a primary key
properties.business_description: Unique identifier assigned to each user for tracking performance data
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate format against expected user ID patterns
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by user ID to analyze specific user performance

properties.description: The name of the task assigned to an employee within the performance management system.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should accurately reflect the task being performed
properties.business_description: This column represents the specific task that is part of the performance evaluation process for employees.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure task names are descriptive and relevant, Check for consistency in naming conventions
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by task status, Filter by user ID

properties.description: Identifier for each task within the performance data.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should be unique within the context of a specific performance review
properties.business_description: Unique identifier for tasks assigned to employees in the performance management system.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for null values, Validate format to ensure it is a valid string representation of a bigint
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by taskStatus, Filter by userId

properties.description: Final rating assigned to a task based on performance evaluation.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the task has not been rated yet, Should reflect a valid rating scale defined by the organization
properties.business_description: This column represents the final rating given to a specific task, reflecting the performance assessment of the employee on that task.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure ratings are within the defined scale (e.g., 1 to 5), Check for consistency with related performance metrics
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by taskStatus, Filter by userId

properties.description: Indicates the current status of a task within the performance evaluation process.
properties.common_patterns: Not Started, In Progress, Completed, On Hold
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should reflect valid task statuses such as 'Not Started', 'In Progress', 'Completed', 'On Hold'
properties.business_description: This column represents the status of a specific task assigned to an employee, which can be used to track progress and completion in performance evaluations.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure values are from a predefined list of valid statuses, Check for null values where applicable
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific task statuses, Filter by userId to see individual task statuses
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of tasks by status, Percentage of tasks in each status

properties.description: Indicates the user or employee to whom a specific step in the performance task is assigned.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the step is not assigned to anyone, Should reference a valid userId from the userId column
properties.business_description: This column represents the individual responsible for completing a particular step in the performance evaluation process.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for valid userId references, Ensure no invalid characters are present in the text
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by userId, Filter by taskId

properties.description: Title of the performance step associated with a task.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should accurately reflect the step's purpose
properties.business_description: This column represents the title of a specific step within a performance task, providing context for the evaluation process.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure consistency in naming conventions, Check for excessive length
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by taskName, Filter by stepStatus

properties.description: Indicates the current status of a performance step within the talent performance process.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should reflect valid status options such as 'Not Started', 'In Progress', 'Completed', etc.
properties.business_description: This column represents the status of a specific step in the performance evaluation process, which can help in tracking progress and identifying bottlenecks.
properties.data_quality_checks: Ensure values are within predefined status options, Check for null values where applicable
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific stepStatus values, Filter by userId to see individual performance steps
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT by stepStatus, GROUP BY stepStatus

properties.description: The date when the performance task starts, represented as a string in timestamp format without time zone.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the task has not started yet, Should follow the format 'YYYY-MM-DD' for consistency
properties.business_description: Indicates the initiation date of a performance-related task for an employee.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate format to ensure it matches 'YYYY-MM-DD', Check for logical consistency with other date fields (e.g., startDate should be before completionDate)
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific start dates, Filter by tasks that started within a certain date range
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of tasks started within a specific period, Average duration from startDate to completionDate

properties.description: Date when the task was completed, represented as a timestamp without time zone.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the task is not completed, Should be in a valid date format
properties.business_description: This column indicates the date on which a specific task was completed by an employee, providing insights into task performance and timelines.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate date format, Check for logical consistency with startDate and stepDueDate
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific userId, Filter by taskName or taskStatus
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of completed tasks, Average completion time per task

properties.description: The date when a performance task or evaluation expires.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the task does not have an expiration date, Should be in a valid date format (YYYY-MM-DD)
properties.business_description: This column indicates the expiration date for a specific performance task, which is relevant for tracking the validity of performance evaluations.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate date format, Check for logical consistency with startDate and completionDate
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by tasks that are expired, Filter by tasks that are active

properties.description: The date by which a specific step in the performance task is due.
properties.business_rules: Can be null, Should be in valid date format
properties.business_description: This column represents the deadline for completing a specific step in the performance evaluation process.
properties.data_quality_checks: Check for valid date format, Ensure dates are not in the past unless specified
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by due date range, Filter by task status

properties.description: The date when the step was submitted in the performance evaluation process.
properties.business_rules: Can be null if the step has not been submitted yet, Should be in a valid date format
properties.business_description: This column represents the date on which a specific step in the performance evaluation process was submitted by the employee.
properties.data_quality_checks: Validate date format, Check for null values where submission is expected
properties.filtering_suggestions: Filter by specific submission dates, Filter by userId to see submissions by individual employees
properties.aggregation_suggestions: COUNT of submissions by date, Average submission date per task

properties.description: This table contains detailed performance data for employees, including task assignments, ratings, and status updates within the Cornerstone Talent Performance module.
properties.business_purpose: To provide a comprehensive view of employee performance metrics, enabling Talent Admins and managers to assess and improve employee productivity and engagement.
properties.data_lineage: Data is sourced from the Cornerstone Talent Performance module, populated through employee interactions with assigned tasks and performance evaluations.
properties.data_retention: Data is retained for a period of 5 years to comply with performance review cycles.
properties.queryPatterns: ["Filter by taskStatus to track task completion", "Filter by stepStatus to monitor step progress", "Join with User_csod to get employee details", "Group by userId to analyze individual performance", "Filter by taskFinalRating to identify high/low performers", "Filter by completionDate to track task completion timeline", "Filter by stepDueDate to identify overdue steps", "Group by taskName to analyze task performance"]
properties.useCases: ["Performance Management: Track employee task assignments and completion status", "Performance Analytics: Analyze task ratings and performance metrics", "Task Management: Monitor task and step status for performance reviews", "Performance Reporting: Generate reports on task completion and ratings", "Overdue Tracking: Identify overdue tasks and steps", "Performance Evaluation: Analyze final ratings and performance trends", "Workflow Management: Track performance evaluation workflow progress"]
